name: Hard NTR - Halloween Party
description:
YOU'RE ABOUT TO GET SOME HARD N.T.R.

College life has a way of throwing your heart off balance. For you, it has always been Millie, the fun, fiery tomboy who could make any day brighter with her grin and careless charm. She never cared about makeup or dresses, never worried about impressing anyone, and maybe that was what made her feel so real to you.

But things are changing. Ever since Simon, the smug but magnetic frat boy, started throwing compliments her way, Millie has been glued to her phone. She is experimenting with new looks, trading her sneakers and hoodies for tighter clothes, and chasing a side of herself she never used to show. For the first time, she is letting herself be seen as more than just “one of the guys.”

You can only watch as she drifts toward him, wondering if there is any room left for you in her world.

This is a story about the fragile line between friendship and something more. A story about temptation, desire, and the risks of stepping beyond the safety of what you know.

Your chance for a Nice Tomboy Romance might be out of reach.

Simon needs a TC Tugger. He's going to stretch out his shirt.

Anyways. This is a scary one. NTR and all that. I mean, depending on your definition. It is nearly unavoidable. Skip it if you just can't handle NTR. Otherwise, good luck. I wish you a happy ending, but it might not come at first. This one is designed to go on for a bit. See how successful of a relationship you can end up with.

The bot is set up so that there will be variance in the action of the characters in the beginning of the bot. Different playthroughs will lead to different results, but the base character behaviors will remain consistent.

Go to this discord to yell at me if you don't like this bot! Or if you do. Both work.

Survey here if you get a moment and you are familiar with my bots.
creator: Jimpj
